recalls.Description: This recall involves AirClub convertible bassinets which convert into a bedside sleeper. The bassinets come in light grey, beige, and purple colors with quilted padding. "Product Model QX-831" is on a label located on the bottom of the convertible bassinets underneath the mattress pad.
recalls.Title: AirClub Convertible Bassinets Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Fall Hazard; Violates Mandatory Standard for Bedside Sleepers
recalls.ConsumerContact: AirClub toll free at 833-977-6667 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT Monday through Friday, email support@airclub-baby.com, or online at https://airclub-baby.com/pages/recall or https://airclub-baby.com/ and click "Recall" at the top of the page for more information.

Images.Caption: Recalled AirClub Convertible Bassinet – Front View light grey
Recalled AirClub Convertible Bassinet - Rear View
"Product Model: QX-831" is printed on a label located on bottom of the convertible bassinets underneath the mattress pad
"Product Model: QX-831” is printed on a label located on bottom of the convertible bassinets underneath the mattress pad
Recalled AirClub Convertible Bassinets L-Shaped Straps Attachment Mechanism

Retailers.Name: Online at Amazon.com from October 2023 through December 2025 for between $110 and $130.

Distributors.Name: Zhangzhou Qiangxing Supply Chain Management Co., Ltd. dba AirClub of China

Hazards.Name: The recalled convertible bassinets violate the mandatory standard for bedside sleepers because the mechanism used to attach the product to the adult bed creates an opening between the bedside sleeper and mattress, posing a deadly fall hazard to infants.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the recalled AirClub convertible bassinets immediately and contact AirClub for a replacement attachment mechanism. Consumers will be asked to cut off the two original L-shape straps, throw them away and follow the instructions provided to install the new four straps with T-shaped buckle.

recalls.Description: This recall involves ZHORANGE portable bassinets with model number 148012-A. The gray portable bassinets include a head pillow and fold into a portable handbag with a handle. When folded into the portable handbag, the brand name "ZHORANGE" is visible in large, white block letters. The inside of the bassinet has black polka dots on the sides. There is a tag with the model number and date of manufacture in the YYYY.MM format.
recalls.Title: ZHORANGE Portable Bassinets Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Fall Hazard; Violation of Federal Standard for Infant Sleep Products; Sold on Amazon.com by DFD Trading
recalls.ConsumerContact: DFD Trading by email at zhorange8695@gmail.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled ZHORANGE Baby portable bassinet (left side)
Label with Model Number and Date of Manufacture

Retailers.Name: Amazon.com from November 2024 through April 2025 for between $0 (as a promotional item) and $76.

Distributors.Name: Nanjing Dengfengda Trading Co. Ltd., d/b/a DFD Trading, of China

Hazards.Name: The recalled portable bassinets violate the federal safety standard for Infant Sleep Products because the sides are too low to contain the infant and the portable bassinets do not have a stand, posing a fall hazard. These violations create an unsafe sleeping environment for infants.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled portable bassinets and contact DFD Trading for a full refund. Consumers should remove the sleeping pad, cut the sides of the portable bassinets and the sleeping pad, and email a photo of the destroyed bassinet to zhorange8695@gmail.com to obtain a full refund. DFD Trading and Amazon are contacting all known purchasers directly.

recalls.Description: This recall involves travel bassinets sold in dark gray, blue, light gray, pink, purple and sky blue. The bassinets fold open and closed, and have a mesh mosquito net that folds over the top. The model name "New Moon" is printed on the canopy, and the mattresses have a star pattern. The bassinets come with a bag with handles on the top. The brand "beberoad LOVE" is printed on the top of the bag. Only bassinets manufactured on or after June 23, 2022 are included in this recall. The model name, model number TB999-1, and manufacture date in DD/YYYY format are located on the bottom of the bassinet in a sewn-in tag.
recalls.Title: Beberoad Love New Moon Travel Bassinets Recalled Due to Fall Hazard; Violation of Federal Regulations for Infant Sleep Products; Sold by Beberoadlove
recalls.ConsumerContact: Beberoadlove collect at 334-316-0066 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT Monday through Friday, email at service@beberoad.com, or online at https://beberoad.com/pages/new-moon-travel-bassinets-safety-recall or https://beberoad.com/ and click "NEWMOON TRAVEL BASSINET RECALL" at the top of the page for more information.

Images.Caption: Recalled travel bassinet in dark gray with canopy
Recalled travel bassinet in light gray with canopy
Recalled travel bassinet in pink with canopy
Recalled travel bassinet in blue with canopy
Recalled travel bassinet in blue without canopy
Recalled travel bassinet in pink without canopy
Sewn-in tag with date of manufacture and model

Retailers.Name: Online at beberoadbaby.com, Walmart.com, and Amazon.com from December 2023 through June 2024 for between $50 and $73.

Hazards.Name: The recalled bassinets violate federal safety regulations for Infant Sleep Products because they do not have a stand, posing a fall hazard if used on elevated surfaces.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled bassinets and contact Beberoadlove for instructions on how to receive a full refund, and how to properly dispose of the product. Beberoadlove and Amazon are contacting all known purchasers directly.
